bertscore.original_cuda_error:
CUDA error: no kernel image is available for execution on the device
Search for `cudaErrorNoKernelImageForDevice' in https://docs.nvidia.com/cuda/cuda-runtime-api/group__CUDART__TYPES.html for more information.
CUDA kernel errors might be asynchronously reported at some other API call, so the stacktrace below might be incorrect.
For debugging consider passing CUDA_LAUNCH_BLOCKING=1
Compile with `TORCH_USE_CUDA_DSA` to enable device-side assertions.

per_entity_results.generated: Network Forwarding and Load Generation Benchmarks with Energy Consumption Measurements
per_entity_results.reference: MoonGen Load Latency Benchmarks

per_entity_results.generated: This dataset documents repeated latency benchmarks of a network forwarding application and load generation tests, executed across multiple runs with varying packet rates and sizes. The methodology involved bootstrapping nodes, preparing device and load generation environments, and orchestrating benchmark runs using MoonGen and a custom forwarding application. Per-run energy measurements, latency histograms, and standard output/error streams were captured for each configuration to evaluate performance and resource utilization. The dataset includes per-run logs and evaluation outputs related to the benchmarking process.
per_entity_results.reference: This experiment measures l2-load-latency in a two-node setup with MoonGen on one node as the load generator and libmoon on another node as the forwarding device under test. The benchmark tests different packet rates and packet sizes. Each measurement runs for fixed duration, records energy consumption on both machines, and stores latency histograms as CSV data and PNG plots for every parameter combination.

per_entity_results.generated: This script prepares a device under test environment by installing dependencies and building a software library.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the DUT node by building libmoon and enabling hugepage support. It also disables CPU turbo boost for more stable forwarding measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: This script prepares a computational environment for load generation by installing and configuring MoonGen.
per_entity_results.reference: Prepares the load-generator node by building MoonGen from the provided repository and branch. Additionally, it enables hugepage support for packet generation and latency measurements.

per_entity_results.generated: Copies file from /home/anonymous/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.
per_entity_results.reference: Copies file from /home/anonymous/experiments/experiments/loop-experiment-llm/evaluation/plot_latency.py to MoonGen/plot_latency.py on node cesis.

per_entity_results.generated: This command executes a simulation to measure latency characteristics with specified parameters and output results to a file.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.

per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram CSV for one benchmark iteration containing the latency-distribution data produced for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: The image displays a histogram summarizing packet latencies, measured in microseconds, for a specific test configuration.
per_entity_results.reference: Uploaded latency histogram plot for one benchmark iteration of the MoonGen L2 load-latency experiment. It visualizes the filtered latency distribution for the selected packet-rate and packet-size combination.

per_entity_results.generated: Energy measurement during experiment on node cesis. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.
per_entity_results.reference: Energy measurement during experiment on node cesis. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.

per_entity_results.generated: This script orchestrates repeated load generation benchmarks, synchronizing with other nodes and capturing per-run energy measurements. It configures packet rate and size from external variables, then launches a load generator process and monitors its execution duration. The script generates and uploads latency histograms and plots for each benchmark run.
per_entity_results.reference: Looped benchmark that iterates over all configured packet-rate and packet-size combinations, synchronizes with the DUT, records node energy usage and runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example. Afterwards it uploads the generated latency histogram and plot.

per_entity_results.generated: Each iteration of the script transfers a workload, synchronizes with other nodes, and captures timing information, using variables such as pkt_rate and pkt_size to control the benchmark action and uploads the per-run logs.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the MoonGen l2-load-latency script with different values for packet rate and packet size, storing the measured latencies in a CSV file, generating a plot, and uploading both artifacts after each run.

per_entity_results.generated: This command executes a compiled program with a Lua script to perform a forward propagation calculation.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs libmoon's l2-forward example so the DUT forwards traffic during the load-generator measurement window.

per_entity_results.generated: Energy measurement during experiment on node nida. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.
per_entity_results.reference: Energy measurement during experiment on node nida. The measurement is done using a GUDE Power Unit providing current, voltage and power consumption values.

per_entity_results.generated: This script orchestrates repeated latency benchmark runs of a network forwarding application. It synchronizes with a measurement system, captures energy consumption per run, and manages the execution of the application with configurable packet rates and sizes. The script also handles process termination and uploads standard output and standard error streams.
per_entity_results.reference: Forwarder that synchronizes with the load-generator node, records energy usage and forwards the received packets back to the load-generator node.

per_entity_results.generated: Each iteration of the script transfers a workload, synchronizes with a remote system, and uploads the results, varying parameters such as `pkt_rate` and `pkt_size` to capture timing and checksum information in per-run logs.
per_entity_results.reference: Each iteration runs the libmoon l2-forward script to forward the received packets from the loadgen node.

per_entity_results.generated: This command executes a simulation to measure latency characteristics with specified parameters and output results to a file.
per_entity_results.reference: Runs MoonGen's l2-load-latency example using the selected transmit and receive ports and histogram output paths.
